name: Yang Chow Fried Rice B1
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Barbecued pork or ham, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Swirl 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil around the bottom and sides of a heated wok.
2. Add chopped green onions and beaten eggs to the hot oil. Stir-fry until set but still runny.
3. Add green peas and shrimp, stirring quickly to combine everything.
4. Immediately add cold cooked rice to the pan, pressing gently with a spatula to separate the grains.
5. Incorporate diced barbecue pork or ham, salt, light soy sauce, and dark soy sauce.
6. Mix all ingredients together quickly over medium heat until evenly combined and heated through. Serve immediately.
